title: MessageRevision.body_type is String while Message.body_type is BodyType — no explanation
description: In types.rs, Message.body_type was upgraded to BodyType in this commit, but MessageRevision.body_type (line 261) remains a plain String. A first-time reader sees the inconsistency and has no comment explaining why the history entry uses a raw string while the live message uses the typed enum. Either MessageRevision.body_type should also be BodyType, or a doc comment should explain why it intentionally stays as String (e.g. 'preserved verbatim from the server for audit purposes').
notes: opinion: stylistic preference. The engineering substance (MessageRevision.body_type inconsistency) is captured in jmap-chat-tui-7c2.1 and jmap-chat-tui-7c2.7. This issue asks only for a doc comment explaining the intentional inconsistency, which is a documentation style preference rather than a distinct engineering finding.
